questionHtml: At t = 0, the switch is connected to X. On the axes, draw a sketch graph to show the variation with time of the voltage VR across R.
markschemeHtml:
decreasing from 12 ✓

correct shape as shown ✓

 

Do not penalize if the graph does not touch the t axis.
